brand.name: NeuralTrix AI
brand.description: An AI based Consulting and AI software development company.
brand.tone: Professional, authoritative, cutting-edge, reliable, clean corporate.

scale.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-primary

surface_strategies.header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/90 border-b border-slate-200 sticky top-0 z-50
surface_strategies.cards: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-sm p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-sm px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-colors
buttons.outline: bg-transparent text-primary border border-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-white rounded-sm px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-all

image_urls.description: Abstract lines and graphs with blue hues for Hero side/background
A man in a blue suit sitting in a chair for CEO Letter section
Two colleagues collaborating at a desk for About or Why Choose Us section
Modern data center for Tech Stack or Infrastructure section background
Abstract blue wavy lines for Solutions or CTA background

sections.name: Header
sections.style: Sticky top-0 with glassmorphism. Left: NeuralTrix AI Logo (text-based large bold). Right: Navigation links and primary CTA 'Talk to AI Experts'.

sections.name: Hero
sections.style: Navy Blue Background (#0B1B3D) full width. White text. Left side: Massive H1 'Engineering the AI-First Enterprise', subtext, and two buttons. Right side: Abstract data analytics image (hero_background) partially masked or floating above the background.

sections.name: CEO Letter / About
sections.style: Split layout. Left: ceo_portrait image. Right: 'Welcome to the AI-First Age', open letter text, large quotation mark icon, signature in cursive font.

sections.name: Services Overview
sections.style: Grid layout (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4). Cards with 1px border. Use lucide-react icons for each service (AI Development, Gen AI, Custom Software, Mobile Apps, AI Agents, LLM Development, DevOps, Data Engineering). Hover effect: background turns Navy, text turns white.

sections.name: Solutions / Products Showcase
sections.style: Zig-zag layout (alternating image and text blocks). Showcase product concepts like DataBrain AI, MediMind AI, etc. Use abstract_tech and team_collaboration images.

sections.name: Case Studies / Portfolio
sections.style: Bento grid with Navy Blue cards and white text, highlighting industry, problem, and AI solution. Minimalist typography focus.

sections.name: Tech Stack & Partners
sections.style: Dark section (Navy) with a highly structured grid of tech icons. IMPORTANT: Use react-icons/si (e.g., SiPython, SiReact, SiAmazonaws, SiOpenai) for the tech stack to avoid broken image links.

sections.name: Stats / Metrics Counters
sections.style: Control Room Grid. 4 columns. Massive numbers (e.g., '10x', '99.9%', '150+') with small overline text. Minimalist, monochrome Navy/White.

sections.name: Industries Served
sections.style: Clean list or grid with large headings (Retail, Healthcare, Fintech, Education, BFSI, Sports & Gaming, Real Estate) and thin bottom borders separating them. Swiss brutalist approach.

sections.name: Why Choose Us
sections.style: Split layout. Left: Title and subtitle. Right: Accordion or stacked list of points (Hallucination Control, Compliance-First) with checkmark icons.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.style: Shadcn Carousel. Large cards, 1px border, subtle shadow. Author name and title in bold. Very clean.

sections.name: Blog / Resources
sections.style: 3-column grid. Clean article cards with uppercase category labels, bold titles, and 'Read More' links.

sections.name: Contact Form
sections.style: Split layout. Left side: Navy background with white text, contact info. Right side: White background, clean Shadcn input forms (First Name, Last Name, Email, Project Description), primary CTA.

sections.name: Footer
sections.style: Navy background, massive padding (py-24). Multi-column link structure, large 'NeuralTrix AI' logo at the bottom.

accessibility.contrast: Strict APCA/WCAG AA compliance. Navy/White contrast is extremely high.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Use framer-motion for smooth, professional fade-ins, but keep it corporate and subtle.
accessibility.testing: Add data-testid to all buttons, inputs, links, and forms.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required font families (Cabinet Grotesk, Satoshi) via Google Fonts or Fontshare CDN in index.html.
Do NOT use placeholder image URLs like via.placeholder.com. ONLY use the provided Unsplash URLs in the media section.
Use react-icons/si for the entire Tech Stack section. Map the required tech (Python, Node.js, AWS, OpenAI, React, PostgreSQL) to Si-prefixed components from react-icons/si.
Build the Hero section with a dark Navy background, and ensure the abstract image is seamlessly integrated without looking like a boxed-in asset (use mix-blend modes or absolute positioning).
Keep borders to 1px and border-radius to rounded-sm (2px or 4px max) to maintain the strict corporate/Swiss aesthetic.
Do not use gradients. Stick to solid Navy (#0B1B3D), solid White (#FFFFFF), and solid Slate for borders.
Use framer-motion for simple 'fade-in-up' entrance animations on scroll for the grid items.
